final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing 3×3 character expression grid illustration inspired by the 仙剑奇侠传 IP character 赵灵儿.

Style/medium: needs a 3D animation aesthetic in the Pixar style — exact rendering and surface treatment is yours
Composition: must be a 3×3 grid layout with 9 equal panels (3 rows × 3 columns), each panel framed by the character peeking through a torn hole in white paper
Subject: must include 赵灵儿 — young woman with long flowing light-colored hair, delicate features, and a gentle fairy-like appearance consistent with the 仙剑奇侠传 IP — rendered across all 9 panels with the following unique expression/action/outfit per panel:
  Top-left: winking / adjusting glasses / green sweater
  Top-center: smirking / lowering dark sunglasses / red leather jacket
  Top-right: thinking / finger on chin / yellow hoodie
  Middle-left: big smile / arms resting on edge / black and white striped shirt
  Middle-center: smiling / thumbs up / orange button-up shirt
  Middle-right: neutral / drinking boba tea / blue sweater
  Bottom-left: happy / waving / purple sweater vest over white shirt
  Bottom-center: laughing with eyes closed / arms crossed / pink cardigan
  Bottom-right: silly / poking cheeks / teal sweater
Scene/backdrop: each panel must show a torn hole in white paper as the framing device through which the character peeks
Lighting/mood: needs a bright, playful, and expressive atmosphere — exact light setup is yours
Color palette: needs a vibrant and varied direction matching each panel's outfit color — exact palette ratios are yours
Materials/textures: needs a clean 3D rendered surface feel with soft Pixar-style shading — exact texture weight is yours
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: must preserve all 9 panels with their distinct expressions, actions, and outfits as listed; character identity must remain consistent as 赵灵儿 across all panels
Avoid: must avoid merging panels, dropping any of the 9 expressions, or losing the torn-paper framing device
